arts.ttl: Aston Villa, Arsenal and Newcastle United lined up for Spanish transfer tussle
arts.sum: Arsenal, Aston Villa and Newcastle United are all lining up for a Spanish transfer tussle with Atletico Madrid to sign Nicolas Jackson from Chelsea. That’s according to Super Deporte, who report that Atlético are not the only club interested in signing the forward this summer. arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta ‘SCARED’ of Isak as Gunners face accusations of PR stunt
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta his too scared of signing a genuine No.9 and his bid for Aston Villa ’s Ollie Watkins was nothing more than a PR stunt to appease supporters, so claims Troy Deeney. “Mikel Arteta, is frightened of signing a genuine No 9 like Isak,” Deeney added.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United offered exciting £49m Bundesliga star as Callum Wilson enquiry goes in
arts.sum: Boniface is not the only striker the London Stadium club are looking at with Newcastle's very own Callum Wilson also on their shortlist. Newcastle United are set to be offered Nigeria star Victor Boniface this summer after his representatives look for his next move.

arts.ttl: ‘Finds himself in limbo’ – Player mysteriously ostracised at new club after Newcastle United
arts.sum: Javier Manquillo has found himself in a strange, unexplained limbo at new club Celta Vigo after leaving Newcastle United a year ago. AS Andalucia cover the player today and how a year after leaving Newcastle, things are not exactly going to plan. arts.ttl: Bid prepared: Newcastle United ready to try €40m move for La Liga star
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly ready to make a €40million transfer bid for Real Sociedad right-back Jon Aramburu in the summer. The Venezuela international has impressed in his time in La Liga, and it now seems he’s firmly on the radar of Newcastle ahead of next season. “I CRIED in my car the day I left […] The post Bid prepared: Newcastle United ready to try €40m move for La Liga star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Akanji to have surgery and miss up to 10 weeks
arts.sum: Manchester City defender Manuel Akanji will undergo surgery on a thigh injury on Saturday and is expected to be absent for up to 10 weeks.

arts.ttl: City v Newcastle programme: Classic cover, Savinho, Stones and much more
arts.sum: Our Newcastle United matchday programme cover celebrates our signings for the present and future with a nod to the past in the latest edition. And we’ve got all the latest info, stats and big news from across all the teams and areas of Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man City identify 'complete' £20m playmaker from Champions League club as ideal Kevin De Bruyne replacement
arts.sum: He's had a similar career trajectory to the Belgian superstar!

arts.ttl: Newcastle United tried to sign me for £2m but it 'didn't feel right' - now I'm matching Salah - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Eddie Howe's side expressed an interest in Robinson as they searched for post-takeover signings - but even before that predecessor Steve Bruce also tried to get a deal done when the full-back was free to leave Wigan Athletic on the cheap. Newcastle United saw this first hand earlier this month as Robinson teed up Raul Jimenez as the west London outfit stole all three points at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Flat track bully, Shearer partner, instinct - Isak vs Haaland Newcastle verdict
arts.sum: If you had asked me this a year ago, I would have given you a different answer - Erling Haaland is a freak, after all - but Alexander Isak has added so much to his game in that time. Erling Haaland has the better goals record but then again look at the players he's had around him.
